name: @koppajs/koppajs-router
description: Reusable History API router primitives for KoppaJS applications.
author: Bastian Bensch

scripts.check:package: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const entry=pkg.exports['.']; const paths=[pkg.main,pkg.module,pkg.types,entry.import,entry.types]; const missing=paths.filter((file)=>!fs.existsSync(file)); if(missing.length>0){ console.error('Missing package entrypoints:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.prepare: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const cp=require('node:child_process'); if(process.env.HUSKY==='0'){ console.log('Skipping husky install (HUSKY=0).'); process.exit(0); } if(!fs.existsSync('.git')){ console.log('Skipping husky install (no .git directory found).'); process.exit(0); } cp.execSync('pnpm exec husky',{stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:ts && pnpm run format:check
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run lint:ts -- --fix && pnpm run format
scripts.test: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:unit
scripts.check: pnpm run check:docs && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build && pnpm run check:package
scripts.validate: pnpm run check && pnpm run test:package
